predictions.source_quote: In this more volatile environment, we expect US corporate earnings growth to slacken in 2019, but remain positive, at around 8 or 9 percent.

predictions.variable: Sydney and Melbourne residential property prices
predictions.source_quote: I would expect residential property prices in Sydney and Melbourne to be flat to slightly down in 2019 which points to a more subdued year for residential property services and construction related companies.
